creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #1)
It applies cleanly here with patch -p2:

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...

--------------------------
|diff --git security/openconnect-gui/Makefile security/openconnect-gui/Makefile
|index 7f8767736b40..fff1b89055b2 100644
|--- security/openconnect-gui/Makefile
|+++ security/openconnect-gui/Makefile
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 2.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 15.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
